title: Void of Death
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Void of Death''' was a belief of the [[Death/Legends|death]]-worshiping [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It was basically a nihilistic belief that the universe would find peace in nothingness. To this end, the cult made it its holy mission to wipe all life from the universe.

==Appearances==
*[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']]
*''[[Otherspace II: Invasion]]''
